Package index

Generate synthetic data

add_concentration()
Add concentrations
add_data_replicates()
Add data replicates
add_day0_data()
Add data with day 0
create_synthetic_cell_lines()
Create data.table with synthetic cell lines
create_synthetic_drugs()
Create data.table with synthetic drugs

Generate synthetic results

generate_e_inf()
Calculate E inf metric
generate_ec50()
Calculate EC50 metric
generate_hill_coef()
Generate hill coefficient
generate_response_data()
Generate response data

Generate test data

get_test_dataset_paths()
get_test_dataset_paths
prepareCodilutionData()
prepareCodilutionData
prepareComboMergedData()
prepareComboMergedData
prepareData()
prepareData
prepareMergedData()
prepareMergedData

Examples of real data

DepMap_CRISPRGeneEffect
CRISPR Gene Effect Scores
DepMap_Model
DepMap Models (Cell Line Metadata)
DepMap_OmicsCNGene
Copy Number Variation (CNV)
DepMap_OmicsExpressionProteinCodingGenesTPMLogp1
Gene Expression (Log2 TPM)

Somatic Mutations (Damaging)
DepMap_OmicsSomaticMutationsMatrixHotspot
Somatic Mutations (Hotspot)
PRISMBroadScreen_Hagenbeek_NatComm_2026
PRISM Broad Screen Cancer Cell Line Viability Dataset

On this page

Developed by Aleksander Chlebowski, Bartosz Czech, Arkadiusz Gladki, Marc Hafner, Marcin Kamianowski, Sergiu Mocanu, Natalia Potocka, Dariusz Scigocki, Janina Smola, Allison Voung.
